roles.name: Super Admin
roles.description: Unrestricted tenant-wide administration and policy control.

roles.name: Admin
roles.description: Operational administration across departments and teams.

roles.name: Security Admin
roles.description: Access reviews, incident triage, and authentication controls.

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to assigned spaces and dashboards.

roles.name: Analyst
roles.description: Reporting, dashboards, and data quality review access.

roles.name: Support Lead
roles.description: Queue management and customer escalation handling.

roles.name: Finance Manager
roles.description: Billing controls, approvals, and financial reporting.
